blurb: Declan Osei-Marsh is the guy you want next to you when something's actually on fire — unflappable, methodical, never raises his voice because he's never needed to. He treats every crisis as a checklist executed one step at a time.
speech_quirks: narrates his own steps in a low, even voice, never interrupts an alarm to react to it, answers panic with a checklist, rarely uses exclamation even when something's genuinely bad
elevenlabs_voice: Male, early 40s. Low, level baritone, unhurried and grounded. Neutral accent, minimal inflection. Pacing stays almost identical whether he's discussing lunch or a hull breach — steady, measured, no rush. Texture: smooth, quiet resonance, breath even and controlled. Delivery is calm and procedural by default; the steadiness itself functions as reassurance for everyone around him.
